title: Deft Auto Eat
description: Deft Auto Eat is a lightweight Fabric mod that automatically swaps food and eats it! with many customizable settings to optimize your experience! and add some QOL
body:
🍖 Deft Auto Eat - Smart Hunger Management
Never worry about hunger again! Deft Auto Eat automatically eats food when you're hungry, letting you focus on building, mining, and exploring without interruption.

✨ Key Features
🎯 Smart & Safe
Intelligent Food Selection: Automatically chooses the best food based on nutrition and preferences

Container Protection: Won't accidentally open chests, barrels, doors, or crafting tables

Combat Detection: Optional setting to avoid eating during fights

Blacklist System: Avoids dangerous foods like rotten flesh

🎮 Easy Controls

Press H: Toggle auto-eat on/off

Press J: Open settings menu

Zero Setup: Works perfectly out of the box

⚙️ Highly Configurable

Hunger threshold (when to start eating)

Favorite food preferences

Combat eating settings

Food priority system

Performance tuning options

🚀 Perfect For

⛏️ Mining: Never starve during long sessions

🏗️ Building: Focus on creativity without hunger interruptions

🌐 Multiplayer: Works flawlessly on any server (client-side only)

♿ Accessibility: Simplified hunger management

🛡️ Advanced Safety
Container Detection - Automatically avoids eating when looking at:

Chests, Barrels, Shulker Boxes
Crafting Tables, Furnaces, Anvils
Doors, Trapdoors, Fence Gates
And 15+ other interactive blocks!
Multiplayer Excellence - Uses proper server synchronization to prevent ghost items and inventory issues.

📋 Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.4

Fabric Loader: 0.16.14+

Fabric API: Latest version

Java: 21+

🎮 Getting Started

Install the mod

Press H to enable auto-eating

Press J for settings (optional)

Enjoy worry-free gameplay!

🔧 How It Works

Monitors your hunger → Finds best food → Moves to hotbar if needed → Eats safely → Restores everything back


💬 Support

Need help? Join our Discord server and open a support ticket for fast assistance with installation, configuration, or troubleshooting!


Transform your Minecraft experience! Download Deft Auto Eat and never manage hunger manually again.


Warning Please Check with the server you are playing on if this mod is allowed, as this might yet you banned on them for it. Use it responsibly and have fun :D

🌟 Client-side only - works on any server
